Team
Home News Team Publication Opportunities About

We work across cybersecurity, privacy engineering, dependable machine learning, and emerging risks in AI.

Lab Lead / PI

Dr Han Wu

Lab Director

Han is an Assistant Professor in Cyber Security at the University of Southampton. His research focuses on AI security and privacy.

PhD Students

Shuyan Zou

PhD started from Jan 2025

Privacy-preserving machine learning, differential privacy, and adaptive optimisation.

Jiawei Wang

PhD Started from Sep 2025

Privacy Auditing, Membership Inference Attacks, Machine unlearning.

Hengyang Yao

PhD Started from Jan 2026

Causal Inference, Privacy, Federated Learning.
